text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 14 

CLM_1ST_DGNS_E_CD 

LABEL: First Claim Diagnosis E Code 

DESCRIPTION: The code used to identify the first external cause of injury, poisoning, or other adverse effect. This 
diagnosis E code is also stored as the 1st occurrence of the diagnosis E code trailer. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_1ST_DGNS_E_CD 

LONG NAME: CLM_1ST_DGNS_E_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 7 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage
